title: Nourishmeorganics Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The Therapeutic Goods Administration issued Victoria-based Nourishmeorganics Pty Ltd an $18,780 infringement notice, paid October 2025, over the alleged unlawful importation and supply of 'Thorne Basic Prenatal' capsules from New Zealand between January and October 2024, a product not entered on the Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods.
scope: Paid an $18,780 TGA infringement notice for alleged unlawful import and supply of an unregistered therapeutic good
